name: @tsproxy/web
description: React components and InstantSearch adapter for typesense-proxy

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts src/adapter/index.ts --format esm --dts --external react --external react-dom --external react-instantsearch
scripts.dev: tsup src/index.ts src/adapter/index.ts --format esm --dts --watch --external react --external react-dom --external react-instantsearch
